author: y4rr
content: Plan: Conv2d struct gains groups: usize and dilation: (usize, usize) fields. new_full() takes 8 args (in,out,kernel,stride,padding,dilation,groups,bias) with full validation. new() shims to new_full(...,(1,1),1,bias). im2col/col2im helpers extended with dilation params; grouped path computes per-group convolutions over per-group im2col slices. GPU dispatch gated to groups==1 && dilation==(1,1) only. Backward updated similarly. Probe-before-fix lands first in tests, then forward; both grouped+dilated forward and backward (vs finite-differences) covered.
